name: CSV to Iceberg (BigLake REST catalog) — batch
description: Reads a CSV from GCS, writes rows to an Apache Iceberg table via the BigLake Iceberg REST catalog, then archives the input file on success.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.label: GCP project id
parameters.helpText: Project that owns the BigLake catalog (x-goog-user-project).

parameters.name: catalog
parameters.label: Catalog / bucket name
parameters.helpText: BigLake Iceberg catalog name; equals the GCS bucket name in single-bucket mode.

parameters.name: catalog_type
parameters.label: Catalog type
parameters.helpText: biglake (Iceberg on GCS, default) or glue (Iceberg on S3 — direct-write, ADR-0007).

parameters.name: aws_region
parameters.label: AWS region
parameters.helpText: Region for the Glue catalog and S3 bucket. Only used when catalog_type=glue.
